title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
